'''gaguthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabineteer|cabineteer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabineteer|cabineteer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gaguthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gægithith|gægithith]] || [[word:gægithij|gægithij]] || [[word:gægithish|gægithish]] || [[word:gægithi|gægithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gaguguthuth|gaguguthuth]] || [[word:gaguguthuj|gaguguthuj]] || [[word:gaguguthush|gaguguthush]] || [[word:gaguguthu|gaguguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gaguthuth|gaguthuth]] || [[word:gaguthuj|gaguthuj]] || [[word:gaguthush|gaguthush]] || [[word:gaguthu|gaguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gagufthuth|gagufthuth]] || [[word:gagufthuj|gagufthuj]] || [[word:gagufthush|gagufthush]] || [[word:gagufthuf|gagufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gaguthuthu|gaguthuthu]] || [[word:gaguthuju|gaguthuju]] || [[word:gaguthushu|gaguthushu]] || [[word:gaguthuku|gaguthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gaguthuth|gaguthuth]] || [[word:gaguthuj|gaguthuj]] || [[word:gaguthush|gaguthush]] || [[word:gaguthu|gaguthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gaguthuthul|gaguthuthul]] || [[word:gaguthujul|gaguthujul]] || [[word:gaguthushul|gaguthushul]] || [[word:gaguthukul|gaguthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gaguthuthuthu|gaguthuthuthu]] || [[word:gaguthujuju|gaguthujuju]] || [[word:gaguthushushu|gaguthushushu]] || [[word:gaguthuku|gaguthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gaguthuthun|gaguthuthun]] || [[word:gaguthujun|gaguthujun]] || [[word:gaguthushun|gaguthushun]] || [[word:gaguthukun|gaguthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gaguthuthuoro|gaguthuthuoro]] || [[word:gaguthujuoro|gaguthujuoro]] || [[word:gaguthushuoro|gaguthushuoro]] || [[word:gaguthukuoro|gaguthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
